info.title: BG Accountability Tenant API
info.description:
REST API for the BG Accountability Platform - Tenant Services.

## Overview
This API serves both the Tenant Web Dashboard (Next.js) and Mobile App (Flutter).

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a valid JWT Bearer token.
- Login via `POST /api/v1/auth/login`
- Include token in header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- Refresh tokens via `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh`

## Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
- If MFA is enabled, login returns a `tempToken`
- Complete MFA via `POST /api/v1/auth/mfa/login` with tempToken + TOTP code

## Rate Limiting
- Default: 100 requests per minute per IP
- Auth endpoints: 10 requests per minute per IP

## Error Format
All errors follow: `{ success: false, message: string, code?: string, details?: object }`

## Pagination
Paginated endpoints use: `{ items: T[], total: number, page: number, pageSize: number }`

password.description: Minimum 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol
Minimum 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol

stepTitles.description: Step number to title mapping for UI display

currentStep.description: Current step number in the onboarding flow (1-based)

completedStep.description: Step identifier to mark as completed

isCompleted.description: Whether the entire onboarding flow is completed

businessDescription.example: I run a digital marketing agency focused on small businesses.

offeringType.description: Whether the business sells products, services, or both

industryOther.description: Custom industry description (when industry is OTHER)

description.example: We provide innovative software solutions for SMBs.

usp.example: We deliver results 50% faster than competitors.

offerings.description: Named products or services offered by the business

monthlyTargets.description: Calculated monthly targets based on projectedYearValue * monthlyContribution[i] / 100

yearMinus3Value.description: Revenue from 3 years ago (null if business did not exist)

yearMinus2Value.description: Revenue from 2 years ago (null if business did not exist)

yearMinus1Value.description: Revenue from last year (null if business did not exist)

projectedYearValue.description: Projected revenue target for the upcoming year

monthlyContribution.description: Monthly contribution percentages (12 values that must sum to ~100%)

averageTicketSize.description: Average ticket size / average transaction size

measurability.example: Increase or decrease in followers, views, likes, comments, and shares

weeklyActivityGoal.description: Target number of activities per week

reminderDays.description: Days of the week to send reminders (0=Sun, 6=Sat)

activities.description: Selected activity templates with measurability and impact metadata

stages.description: Array of created/updated sales cycle stages

probability.description: Probability of closing at this stage (0-100)

stages.description: Array of sales cycle stages (replaces all existing stages)

targetValue.description: Target value (revenue/sales) to reach this stage

reward.example: Congratulations! You have reached your first milestone!

stages.description: Array of achievement stages (replaces all existing stages)

selectedPlan.description: Selected plan stored in onboarding progress

items.description: Items per category with target vs actual

overallCompletionPercent.description: Overall completion percentage across all categories

remarks.example: Asked to follow up next week.
Asked to follow up next week.

type.description: Type of diagnostic (SALES, ACTIVITY, or OUTCOME)

message.example: Activity levels are healthy, but conversions are low. Review lead quality.

salesAchievementPercent.description: Sales achievement percentage for the week

activityCompletionPercent.description: Activity completion percentage for the week

outcomeCompletionPercent.description: Outcome completion percentage for the week

diagnostics.description: Array of diagnostic messages based on rule engine

subject.description: Brief subject line for the ticket

message.example: When I try to load the metrics page, it shows a blank screen. This started happening after the latest update.

message.description: Comment to add to the support ticket thread
message.example: Thanks, I can reproduce this issue now.

targetUserId.description: Target user ID (defaults to current user)
